subcodes.first_line: We have caused them that are possessed of true knowledge to become intoxicated with the choice wine of utterance. Exalted is this wine whose seal hath been broken by the Finger [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اسکرنا اولی العرفان من رحیق البیان تعالی هذا الرحیق الذی فک ختمه باصبع
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @blind imitation [taqlid]
